prd_refs: PRD §16 v0.4 richer ranking and result selection UI (line 2940)
description: Interactive picker for ranked search results — keyboard arrows, fuzzy filter, selection callback. Falls back to numbered prompt when terminal does not support interactive input.
notes: Avoid platform-specific key handling; rely on `[Console]::ReadKey(intercept=$true)` only when interactive.
steps: TDD: Returns selected item from a list.
TDD: Falls back to numbered prompt in non-interactive terminals.
Author `Read-SlashOpsSelection.ps1` using FxConsole grid + key reader.
name: [ma-08] Interactive ranking and selection UI
